articles.title: Cumhurbaşkanı Erdoğan'dan İran açıklaması. "Savaşı durdurmak için çalışıyoruz, önceliğimiz ateşkesin sağlanması"
articles.title_tr: Cumhurbaşkanı Erdoğan'dan İran açıklaması. "Savaşı durdurmak için çalışıyoruz, önceliğimiz ateşkesin sağlanması"
articles.summary:
Cumhurbaşkanı Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, AK Parti Ankara teşkilatına verilen iftar programında açıklamalarda bulundu. Cumhurbaşkanı Erdoğan İran'a yönelik saldırıların uluslararası hukuku açıkça ihlal ettiğini söyledi. Erdoğan, 
"Savaşı durdurmak için çalışıyoruz. Önceliğimiz ateşkesin sağlanması, diyalog kapısının açılmasıdır" ifadelerini kullandı.

Cumhurbaşkanı Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, AK Parti Ankara teşkilatına verilen iftar programında açıklamalarda bulundu. Cumhurbaşkanı Erdoğan İran'a yönelik saldırıların uluslararası hukuku açıkça ihlal ettiğini söyledi. Erdoğan, 
"Savaşı durdurmak için çalışıyoruz. Önceliğimiz ateşkesin sağlanması, diyalog kapısının açılmasıdır" ifadelerini kullandı.
articles.long_summary:
Cumhurbaşkanı Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, AK Parti Ankara teşkilatına verilen iftar programında açıklamalarda bulundu. Cumhurbaşkanı Erdoğan İran'a yönelik saldırıların uluslararası hukuku açıkça ihlal ettiğini söyledi. Erdoğan, 
"Savaşı durdurmak için çalışıyoruz. Önceliğimiz ateşkesin sağlanması, diyalog kapısının açılmasıdır" ifadelerini kullandı.

articles.title: Sonic The Hedgehog 4, The Fourth Entry In Less Than A Decade, Is Now Filming
articles.title_tr: Sonic The Hedgehog 4, The Fourth Entry In Less Than A Decade, Is Now Filming
articles.summary: The fourth Sonic the Hedgehog movie is now in production, Oscar-nominated director Jeff Fowler has announced with a photo from the movie's set. The photo shows Fowler holding a hammer, and this appears to be reference to the character Amy Rose, who will be voiced by Kristen Bell.Sonic the Hedgehog 4 is set for release in March 2027, so fans still have to wait a while to see it. Fowler directed the previous three Sonic movies and is coming back for the fourth.The cast for Sonic 4 features Ben Schwartz returning to play Sonic, with Bell coming aboard as Rose. Dr. Robotnik actor Jim Carrey stated that he's "definitely open" to returning for another sequel, but it remains to be seen if he'll actually be in it. No other casting or story details are available.Continue Reading at GameSpot

articles.title: Get Power Rangers And 7 More Retro-Inspired Games With Humble's New Charity Bundle
articles.title_tr: Get Power Rangers And 7 More Retro-Inspired Games With Humble's New Charity Bundle
articles.summary: Video games might look more impressive than ever, but retro-inspired titles with low-polygon counts and pixel-art aesthetics still have their charm. If you're a connoisseur of the classics, you'll want to check out this new Humble Bundle deal. The Cartridge Chaos bundle celebrates indie PC games with a retro feel, and for just $22 or more, you can grab a highlight reel of titles and support charity. All of these games can be redeemed on your Steam account.Humble's deal offers four games from its curated list for just $10.35 if you want a smaller sample of games with an old-school feel. Proceeds from the sale go to NPower, a non-profit focused on empowering people through skills training and real-world experience.Highlights include Mighty Morphin Power Rangers: Rita's Rewind, a brawler featuring Angel Grove's teenagers with attitude. With hand-drawn art, DinoZords, and plenty of Putty Squad troopers to knock out, it's a fun beat-'em-up, while Vengeful Guardian: Moonrider is another side-scrolling action title that channels the golden age of classic 16-bit games. Corn Kidz 64 looks like it would fit right in on the N64 console with its blocky design, and there's even a Shantae game on the list for some charming platforming fun.Continue Reading at GameSpot

articles.title: Kratos Actor From God Of War Show Responds To The Reaction To The Odd-Looking First Image
articles.title_tr: Kratos Actor From God Of War Show Responds To The Reaction To The Odd-Looking First Image
articles.summary: Actor Ryan Hurst, who plays Kratos in the upcoming God of War TV show for Prime Video, has reacted to the response to the release of the first image from the series.For anyone just catching up, the first image shows Hurst and actor Callum Vinson in costume as Kratos and Atreus, respectively. The image was mocked online for how odd it looked, with some saying it makes the actors look like cosplayers.He said on his Instagram story (via Culture Crave), "Don't believe everything you see on the internet, kids."Continue Reading at GameSpot

articles.title: WoW: Midnight's Silvermoon City Remake Is A Hit, And Players Want More
articles.title_tr: WoW: Midnight's Silvermoon City Remake Is A Hit, And Players Want More
articles.summary: World of Warcraft's Midnight expansion is live now for Epic Edition owners and soon to be available to everyone else, and if there's one thing the community appears to be in agreement on, it's that Blizzard nailed its revamp of Silvermoon City and the Blood Elf lands of Eversong.Those who opted to spend more on the Epic Edition have been able to put the expansion's new zones and story through its paces over the weekend. A quick glance at the WoW subreddit or other WoW community sites shows there are, of course, a wide variety of opinions on Midnight's story, characters, and voice acting.          There is, however, one aspect of the expansion the community seems to have found some consensus on: the new Silvermoon City is a hit. Blizzard completely reimagined the Blood Elf capital city of Silvermoon and its surrounding lands, first introduced in 2007 as part of the game's first expansion, for Midnight. The results have players feeling some serious nostalgia, and wanting more where that came from.Continue Reading at GameSpot

articles.title: Pokemon Pokopia Is Now The Most Critically-Acclaimed Pokemon Game Ever
articles.title_tr: Pokemon Pokopia Is Now The Most Critically-Acclaimed Pokemon Game Ever
articles.summary: Pokemon has a long and storied videogame history, but the most critically-acclaimed yet is no longer from the mainline role-playing games as you might have expected.Instead, Pokemon Pokopia, the latest adaptation that replaces battles with building, is now the highest-rated Pokemon game currently on Metacritic. Reviews are still being published, but Pokemon Pokopia currently sits at an average of 89 after 53 reviews at the time of writing. That puts it a single point ahead of the next on on the list, Pokemon X / Y, and ahead of fan favorites like Pokemon Black and White, Pokemon Sun and Moon, and well ahead of the series latest game, Pokemon Legends: Z-A, which sits at an average of 78.Considering Pokemon's latest mainline entry, Pokemon Winds and Waves, is only set to launch in 2027, Pokemon Pokopia could be the best way to get your Pokemon fix and melt the time away. GameSpot's 9/10 Pokemon Pokopia review praised the game's combination of Animal Crossing and Dragon Quest Builders, saying "Pokemon Pokopia gives you a massive amount to do and a story that propels you forward, while also letting you enjoy the simple pleasure of living among your Pokemon friends and building your perfect community."Continue Reading at GameSpot

articles.title: Jim Carrey Is Not a Clone, Insists Awards Official
articles.title_tr: Jim Carrey Is Not a Clone, Insists Awards Official
articles.summary: If you’re fairly online, like we are, you probably heard about the viral rumor that Jim Carrey, or, more specifically, the Jim Carrey who recently accepted an honorary award at the Cesar Awards in Paris, was a clone. However, the festival’s general delegate, Gregory Caulier, is setting the record straight by revealing that The Mask, Liar Liar, and The Truman Show star underwent months of planning ahead of his appearance at the ceremony.

articles.summary: Apple’ın en ucuz iPhone 17 modeli iPhone 17e tanıtıldı.  Siyah, beyaz ve açık pembe renk seçenekleriyle satışa sunulacak olan iPhone 17e’nin 256 GB’lık modeli 54.999 TL’den, 512 GB’lık modeli de 66.999 TL’den satışa sunulacak. 4 Mart tarihinde ön siparişe açılacak olan iPhone 17e, 11 Mart’tan sonra satın alınabilir olacak. iPhone 17e özellikleri Ekran tarafına baktığımızda, […]
